headline: Cadence Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Webcast
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., April 06, 2026--Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) will hold its first quarter 2026 financial results webcast on Monday, April 27, 2026.

raw.headline: Cadence Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Webcast

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Cadence (CDNS) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Cadence (CDNS) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
